name: Fix Yelp categories
guide: Log in at biz.yelp.com. Go to Business Information and add these categories: Hotels, Bed & Breakfast, Inn. Currently it only shows "Music Venues" which hides you from travelers.

triggers.message: Nice! Now update the Yelp description while you're logged in.

name: Claim Apple Maps listing
guide: Go to mapsconnect.apple.com. Sign in with the Apple ID for the business. Search for "Big Muddy Inn Natchez" — if it exists, claim it. If not, add it. Set categories: Hotel, Bed & Breakfast.

name: Claim Bing Places listing
guide: Go to bingplaces.com. You can import directly from Google Business Profile — click "Import from Google" to save time. This copies your name, address, hours, etc.

name: Claim Foursquare listing
guide: Go to business.foursquare.com. Search for the listing and claim it. Categories: Hotel, Live Music Venue. Foursquare data feeds into Apple Maps and Uber, so this helps multiple platforms.

name: Update Google Business description
guide: Sign in at business.google.com with tracy@thebigmuddyinn.com. Go to Edit Profile > Description. Replace with the copy below (750 chars max).

triggers.message: Great! While you're in Google Business, verify the categories next.

name: Verify Google categories
guide:
In Google Business Profile, go to Edit Profile > Category. Set:
  • Primary: Inn or Bed & Breakfast
  • Additional: Boutique Hotel, Live Music Venue, Fine Art Gallery
Also verify attributes: check-in/out times, Free Wi-Fi, Free parking.

triggers.message: Categories are set! Now add the Q&A — the content is pre-written for you.

name: Add Google Q&A (10 questions)
guide: On your Google listing, scroll to the Q&A section. Post these questions yourself and answer them — this is totally allowed and Google recommends it. All 10 Q&A pairs are pre-written below.

triggers.message: Q&A is done! Now respond to your Google reviews — responses are pre-written for each reviewer.

name: Respond to all Google reviews
guide: Go to your Google Business reviews. We've written personalized responses for all 10 visible reviews. Just copy-paste each one. Any new reviews that come in — use the templates at the bottom.

triggers.message: Reviews are handled! Last Google task: upload photos if you have fewer than 20.

name: Upload Google photos (aim for 20+)
guide:
Upload high-quality photos to your Google listing. Organize by:
  • Exterior (2-3 photos)
  • Each suite (2-3 per room = 12-18 photos)
  • Blues Room venue (3-4 photos)
  • Courtyard and common areas (2-3 photos)
  • Food/drinks if applicable
Google listings with 20+ photos get 35% more clicks.

triggers.message: Google Business Profile is fully optimized! That's your #1 listing done.

name: Check Facebook page visibility
guide:
Go to facebook.com/thebigmuddyinn. Click Settings > General. Make sure:
  • Page Visibility: Published
  • Country Restrictions: None
  • Age Restrictions: None
If any restrictions are on, remove them — they may be hiding your page from search.

triggers.message: Page is visible! Now update the About section — content is pre-written.

name: Update Facebook About section
guide: Go to your Facebook page > About > Edit. Fill in each field using the pre-written content below.

triggers.message: About section is done! Add the Book Now button next — takes 2 minutes.

name: Add Facebook "Book Now" button
guide: On your Facebook page, click the button below your cover photo (it may say "Contact Us" or "Send Message"). Change it to Book Now and link to your CloudBeds booking engine URL. If CloudBeds isn't live yet, link to thebigmuddyinn.com.

triggers.message: Book Now button is live! Set up the auto-reply for Messenger next.

name: Set up Messenger auto-reply
guide: Go to Settings > Messaging > Set Up Automated Responses. Turn on Instant Reply and set the message to the pre-written copy below. Also set the Away Message.

triggers.message: Auto-reply is set! Link Facebook to Instagram next.

name: Link Facebook to Instagram
guide: Go to Facebook Business Settings > Instagram. Connect the Instagram account @thebigmuddyinnandbluesroom. This lets you cross-post and manage both from one place.

triggers.message: Connected! Now switch over to Instagram on your phone.

name: Verify Instagram business account
guide: Open Instagram app > Settings > Account > Switch to Professional Account (if not already). Choose Business (not Creator). Set category to Hotel. This unlocks insights, contact buttons, and the ability to run ads.

triggers.message: Business account is on! Update the bio next — 3 options to choose from.

name: Update Instagram bio & contact
guide: Update your Instagram profile with the bio, contact buttons, and action button. Three bio options are pre-written below — pick the one that feels right.

triggers.message: Bio looks great! Now create Story Highlights — guide is below.

name: Create Instagram Story Highlights
guide: Create Story Highlights on the Instagram profile. You can start with 2-3 stories per highlight and build over time. Suggested highlights and content ideas below.

triggers.message: Social media is dialed in! Facebook and Instagram are both optimized.

name: Verify TripAdvisor listing is managed
guide: Go to tripadvisor.com/Owners. Search for "Big Muddy Inn Natchez" and claim/verify management access. Sign in with tracy@thebigmuddyinn.com.

triggers.message: Listing is claimed! Update the description and room types next.

name: Update TripAdvisor details
guide:
In the TripAdvisor Management Center, update:
  • Description: Use the Long copy from Content Library
  • Room types: Add all 6 suites with descriptions
  • Amenities: Free Wi-Fi, Free parking, Live music venue, Art gallery, Courtyard
  • Photos: Upload 20+ organized by category

triggers.message: Details updated! Now respond to any TripAdvisor reviews.

name: Respond to all TripAdvisor reviews
guide: TripAdvisor management responses heavily influence ranking. Respond to every review. Use the review response templates below. Sign off as: Tracy — Owner, The Big Muddy Inn & Blues Room

triggers.message: TripAdvisor done! Move to Yelp next.

name: Update Yelp description & history
guide:
Log into biz.yelp.com. Go to Business Information and update:
  • Specialties: Boutique hotel with 6 blues-themed suites and 50-seat live music venue
  • History: Tell the story of the property and the blues connection
  • From the business: Use the Standard description copy from the Content Library

triggers.message: Description updated! Upload photos while you're logged in.

name: Upload Yelp photos
guide:
Upload photos to Yelp organized by:
  • Exterior and entrance
  • Individual suites
  • The Blues Room
  • Courtyard and common areas
Business-uploaded photos appear first and set the tone for your listing.

triggers.message: Photos uploaded! Respond to any Yelp reviews to finish up.

name: Respond to all Yelp reviews
guide: Respond to every Yelp review. Same approach as Google — be personal, specific, and professional. Use the review response templates. Note: Yelp does NOT allow businesses to ask for reviews.

triggers.message: All review platforms are handled! Your online reputation is in great shape.

name: Create B.B. King Suite on Airbnb
guide: You have 5 listings on Airbnb but are missing the B.B. King Suite. Create a new listing with the pre-written content below.

triggers.message: B.B. King Suite is listed! Update the other 5 listings next.

name: Update 5 existing Airbnb listings
guide:
Go through each of the 5 existing Airbnb listings and update:
  • Title format: "[Suite Name] at The Big Muddy Inn — Boutique Blues Hotel"
  • Description: Use the suite descriptions from Content Library
  • Verify 5-10 high-quality photos per listing
  • Check that all amenities are listed

triggers.message: Listings updated! Quick check — verify Instant Book is on.

name: Verify Instant Book on all Airbnb
guide: For each listing, go to Listing Settings > Booking Settings. Make sure Instant Book is ON and Smart Pricing is OFF. Smart Pricing can undercut your rates.

triggers.message: Airbnb is all set! Check on the VRBO listing next.

name: Verify VRBO listing status
guide:
The VRBO listing exists in innRoads but isn't showing up in search. Check:
  • Log into innRoads and check VRBO distribution settings
  • Make sure the channel connection is active
  • Find your VRBO Property ID and search for it directly on vrbo.com
  • If the listing is hidden, make sure content, photos, and pricing are all complete

name: Submit Booking.com application
guide: This is the #1 priority new channel. The complete application guide with all pre-written content is below — work through it step by step.

triggers.message: Booking.com application submitted! While it processes, do Expedia next.

name: Submit Expedia application
guide: The complete Expedia application guide is below — all content is pre-written.

triggers.message: Both OTA applications are in! You'll hear back within 1-2 weeks.

name: List Blues Room on Songkick
guide: The step-by-step guide for listing The Blues Room on Songkick is below, including how to get venue representative access.

triggers.message: Songkick is set up! Do Bandsintown next — same idea, different platform.

name: List Blues Room on Bandsintown
guide: The step-by-step guide for listing The Blues Room on Bandsintown is below. Also includes how Amy can create an artist profile.

name: Generate Google review QR code
guide: This has already been created for you! The QR code links directly to the Google review form.

notes.text: QR code created by Delta Dawn system — file at google_review_qr.png

name: Print in-room review cards
guide: A printable 5x7 review card has been designed for you. Print at least 12 cards (2 per suite) on nice card stock. Place them on the nightstand or desk in each suite.

notes.text: Review card PDF designed by Delta Dawn system — review_card.pdf

name: Set up post-stay review email
guide: Set up an automated email that goes out 24-48 hours after checkout. Use the post-stay email template from the Content Library. You can set this up in CloudBeds or your email marketing tool.

name: Troubleshoot VRBO if inactive
guide:
If the VRBO listing still isn't showing after checking innRoads:
  • Contact VRBO Partner Support directly
  • Ask them to look up your property by address: 411 N Commerce St, Natchez, MS 39120
  • They can tell you if content is incomplete or if there's a technical block
  • Make sure all photos, descriptions, and pricing are filled in

name: Set up pre-arrival email template
guide: Set up an email that sends automatically upon booking AND 3 days before arrival. The complete template is below — just copy into CloudBeds or draft it in Gmail.

triggers.message: Pre-arrival email is set! Set up the post-stay template next.

name: Set up post-stay email template
guide: Set up a follow-up email 24-48 hours after checkout asking for a review. This is your most powerful review generation tool. Template below.

triggers.message: Post-stay email done! Last one: set up the email signature.

name: Create email signature for staff
guide: Set up this signature in Gmail for tracy@thebigmuddyinn.com and any other staff email accounts. Go to Gmail > Settings > Signature and paste the content below.

triggers.message: That's everything! All 38 tasks are complete. The Big Muddy is fully set up across every platform.
